title: bidens schimperi
intro: Bidens schimperi, also known as Schimper's Beggar's Lice, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family. It is traditionally used in medicine due to its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as relieving fever, reducing swelling, and treating skin infections, as well as possessing antioxidant and immunomodulatory effects. In herbal preparations, Bidens schimperi is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
